✨ Populate Empty Sessions

🏕 New Holiday Club Plan
🔀 Review Differences
⬆ Import Activities from CSV
Upload a CSV file to add new activities and align existing ones. New items are added; differences in existing items are flagged for review.
Required columns (in order):
name  ·  category  ·  month  ·  resources  ·  notes  ·  link

Category values: Wide Games · Games · Bushcraft & Skills · Craft Projects · Recipes & Cooking · Foraging · Stories · Songs · Seasonal & Spiritual · Woodland Tasks · Afternoon Tea Club
Month values: Jan · Feb · Mar · Apr · May · Jun · Jul · Aug · Sep · Oct · Nov · Dec · all (or "Year Round")
📄
Click to choose a file or drag and drop here
(.csv files only)
📅 Add to a session
Choose which upcoming session to add this activity to. It will be added to all matching rows in that session.
✏ Fix Categories in Bulk
Change the category of all your manually-added activities that currently have one category to another. This is useful after a CSV import where the wrong category was assigned.
